title: useLocalStorage
description: Create a custom hook that syncs a value with the browser's local storage.
problemStatement:
Reusable persistence! Create a custom hook `useLocalStorage(key, initialValue)`. It should return a stateful value and a function to update it, both of which are synced with `localStorage`.

**Requirement:** Name the hook starting with `use`.
hints: A custom hook is just a JavaScript function that can call other Hooks.
expectedOutput: A custom hook that returns [value, setValue]
